title: GCP BigQuery Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Google Cloud BigQuery data analytics.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'GCP BigQuery'?
options: Providing a powerful and scalable data analytics platform for analyzing large amounts of project data in the cloud

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using BigQuery for your application project's data analysis?
options: Benefit from its built-in SQL interface to correctly analyze large project datasets as intended
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
